boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: standing PO authorizes recurring invoice within tolerance.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact closure; SRC-CD4055F2E56D-CTL confirms control record is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped to a different action.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: SRC-CD4055F2E56D-CTL explicitly states required control record for standing PO window and tolerance band is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped to a different action than the requested recurring invoice within tolerance.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Dependency defect remains open per SRC-CD4055F2E56D-CTL. SRC-CD4055F2E56D-POL mandates source-record closure before execution. SRC-CD4055F2E56D-BND prohibits tone/urgency substitution.

final_answer: Source records confirm the action boundary remains open. SRC-CD4055F2E56D-CTL explicitly states the required control record for standing PO window and tolerance band is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped to a different action. SRC-CD4055F2E56D-POL mandates execution may proceed only when current source records close the exact requested action boundary. Prior vendor history (SRC-CD4055F2E56D-FBK) and tone (SRC-CD4055F2E56D-BND) cannot substitute for source-control closure. The action may not proceed. ESCALATE for exact control record repair before any execution decision.
